body:
## Summary
- Make the default web Remove Ads runtime fail closed with an unavailable provider instead of public mock purchases.
- Keep mock-owned Remove Ads behavior behind `__SMT_E2E__` and add runtime/validator guards for buy, restore, and stored entitlement handling.
- Render localized mobile-app-only Remove Ads copy on web and clean up a duplicate `app/sources.tsx` import that blocked the lint gate.

## Validation
- `npm run test:monetization`
- `node --test scripts/monetization.test.js tests/remove-ads-web-e2e-mock-runtime.test.js tests/content-remove-ads-hook-parity.test.js --test-name-pattern 'Remove Ads|web|mock|production|E2E|createDefaultPurchaseRuntimeOptions|PremiumBanner'`
- `node scripts/validate-content.js --focus-remove-ads-hook-parity`
- `npm run typecheck -- --pretty false`
- `npm run lint`
- `npm run test:ownership`
- `prettier --check` on changed files
- `npm run build:web:export -- --max-workers 2`
- exported-web Playwright smoke for disabled web Remove Ads buy path
- `git diff --check`
title: [codex] setup: fail closed web Remove Ads purchases
